Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.convert
Spring Data Cassandra specific converter infrastructure.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.

    StatementFactory.ProjectionFunction.computeProjection(EntityProjection<?,?> projection, MappingContext<? extends CassandraPersistentEntity<?>, ? extends CassandraPersistentProperty> context)
    Compute Columns to be selected for a given EntityProjection.

    Method
    Description

    QueryMapper.getMappedColumnNames(Columns columns, CassandraPersistentEntity<?> entity)

    List<Columns.Selector>
    QueryMapper.getMappedSelectors(Columns columns, CassandraPersistentEntity<?> entity)
    Map Columns with a type hint to Columns.ColumnSelectors.
